message: Jake
Jennifer
I was half-dragged out,
of
the passenger seat of the driving Jaguar.
Where I ended up was her hotel,
where she was staying.
Well, this is quite
painful.
It looks deep, but it’s actually shallow. It’s no big deal.
But I have to take care of it,
neglecting it could lead to tetanus.
No way!? A scratch like this isn't a big deal.
No, don’t say that. I’m really worried.
When I was drowning in drugs and escaping from the ties of reality, a female friend from my student days was taking care of me in various ways for a while.
Looking at now,
it somehow reminds me of that time.
Ah, I see, the lines are the same.
No, don’t say that. I’m really worried.
She had said those words many times. Was that her catchphrase?
Does it hurt?
No, not really anymore.
I thought it might hurt since you were quiet.
It’s okay now.
By the way, what’s the story?
I wonder if anyone would believe this.
The view from this room is wonderful, want to take a look?
She turns off the lights and walks towards the window.
At the back of the room, there was a large window with an amazing night view.
Wow, that's amazing!
See, isn't it lovely? I was glad to stay in this room.
Can I stay like this for a bit?
Saying that,
she embraced me.
The faint scent of her perfume and her soft body stimulated my senses.
It had been a while since I experienced such a sweet moment.
I've wanted this for a long time.
I wanted someone to support me.
You know,
ever since I saw you at the party, I've wanted to do this with you.
She hugged me.
Her body was trembling slightly.
It was like the embrace of a young girl clinging to her parent.
I'm not strong at all, you see.
That's why I hated being told all sorts of things.
Sure, there are many rumors about you.
Why do I have to be talked about like that?
Is it because I was just lucky?
I’m not sure about that, but if you have no recollection, then don't worry about it.
Y-yeah, that's true but...
But,
until now, no one has seen me normally.
Do you see me as an ordinary woman?
Well, that's,
fine, it doesn't have to be!
Just hold me like this for tonight,
without thinking about anyone else.
Did something happen?
Please, just look at me.
Just for now would be okay.
Mmm.
I can't believe I'm embracing the woman I’ve only seen on
the screen.
Like this.
The warmth of her body is
the undeniable presence of her hand wrapped around my back, telling me this isn’t a dream.
I am
slipping my tongue inside. Her tongue entangles with mine.
Nn, Nnn.
Her sweet breaths hit my face. It feels like my head is buzzing.
There’s no rationality left in my thoughts.
If this is a trap, then I’ve completely fallen for it.
But honestly, I don’t care about that anymore.
How.
So beautiful. Much more than in a movie.
I want you to see the real me.
Please look at me.
Ah.
You’re really beautiful.
Your firm chest and your slim waist.
It’s really nice.
No, you can’t touch yet.
Look more.
Your finely textured skin is just like that of an Asian woman.
Speaking of which, your assistant girl.
Wasn’t she Asian? No way, with that girl?
You mean Yuriko? No way, she’s still a child.
Not like a mature woman.
Do you like me more?
Of course, I’ve never met someone like you.
Ah,
I’d be happy even if it’s a lie.
It’s not a lie.
I can’t hold back anymore, is that okay?
Yes.
Shall we go to the bedroom?
No way
I can't wait that long.
Ah.
Wait, no!
Aah!
S-someone is watching!
I don't care. Let those who want to watch, watch.
No way.
Please, don't.
Nn!
My hot lump is slipping in.
It's already ready to welcome me.
I might be seen.
There's no doubt that the situation of possibly being seen is affecting her.
Ahh!
Amazing, it's amazing!
My mind is already in no state to think calmly.
My body moved on its own, inspired by the moans.
Nn, nn.
P-please.
Harder!
That's right.
More, more.
I'm already.
G-good.
Together.
Ah, aah!
